metadata.title: About Us — Free Online Tools Built for Everyone | Fancy Toolbox
metadata.description: Learn about Fancy Toolbox: a privacy-first, browser-based suite of 50+ free online tools. No sign-up, no uploads — every tool runs locally on your device.
metadata.keywords: about fancy toolbox, free online tools, browser-based tools, privacy tools

sections.heading: Our Mission
sections.body: Fancy Toolbox is a comprehensive collection of free online tools designed to help you get things done quickly and efficiently. From text manipulation to image editing, PDF processing to developer utilities — we've got you covered.

sections.heading: Why Fancy Toolbox?
sections.body: We believe that powerful tools should be accessible to everyone. That's why all our tools are completely free, work directly in your browser, and require no sign-up or personal information. Your privacy is our priority — all processing happens locally on your device.

sections.heading: What Makes Us Different
sections.body: Our tools are built with modern web technologies, ensuring fast performance and a seamless user experience across all devices. We're constantly adding new tools and improving existing ones based on user feedback.
